devdoc.author: edsphinx
devdoc.details: Used by GasX Paymaster to enforce subsidy limits and oracle verification logic.

params.newMaxUsd: New max allowed subsidy in USD (6 decimals)

params.newSigner: The new authorized oracle signer address

bulkSetMaxUsd(bytes4[],uint256[]).details: Only callable by the contract owner

params.maxUsds: Array of max USD values (6 decimals)

params._oracleSigner: Initial address allowed to sign oracle payloads

params.selectors: List of selectors to query (4-byte signatures)

returns.results: Array of USD caps (6 decimals) matching input selectors

returns.maxUsd: Max allowed subsidy in USD (6 decimals)

setMaxUsd(bytes4,uint256).details: Only callable by the contract owner

setOracleSigner(address).details: Only callable by the contract owner

params.newSigner: Address of the new oracle signer

devdoc.title: GasXConfig

LengthMismatch().notice: Thrown when array lengths don't match

ZeroAddress().notice: Thrown when zero address is provided

MaxUsdSet(bytes4,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when a selector's max USD subsidy is set or updated

OracleSignerUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the oracle signer is changed

bulkSetMaxUsd(bytes4[],uint256[]).notice: Batch update of max USD subsidy for multiple selectors

constructor.notice: Deploys the config with the initial signer

getAllLimits(bytes4[]).notice: Returns an array of max USD limits for the given selectors

getMaxUsd(bytes4).notice: Returns the max allowed USD subsidy for a given selector

maxUsdPerSelector(bytes4).notice: Mapping of function selectors to their max USD cap (6 decimals)

oracleSigner().notice: Address of the authorized signer used for oracle-signed payload validation

setMaxUsd(bytes4,uint256).notice: Sets the max USD subsidy allowed for a given function selector

setOracleSigner(address).notice: Updates the signer used to verify oracle payloads

userdoc.notice: Stores and manages configuration data for GasX protocol:         - oracleSigner: address authorised to sign off-chain subsidy data         - maxUsdPerSelector: maps function selectors to max spend in USDC
